arts.sum: Both Celtic and St Mirren are looking to put disappointing defeats in midweek behind them, as they meet in the Scottish Premiership at Parkhead on Sunday afternoon. Defeat on derby day hasn't been to...

arts.ttl: 'I saw'... Paulo Bernardo on Arne Engels being hit by missile in Rangers vs Celtic clash
arts.sum: Other incidents that have marred the Rangers vs Celtic Ibrox Glasgow Derby Indeed, this isn’t the first time incidents like this have happened when Celtic have visited Ibrox but everyone connected to the club will certainly be hoping that it is the last.

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton's fiery exchange & drops Champions League truth bombs to Man City fan about Celtic
arts.sum: So when a Man City, fan tried to use that as an excuse for his own team’s failures in the league this season, Celtic hero Chris Sutton wasn’t having any of it as he sent him a serious Champions League reminder about his old club. Despite having resources that vastly outstrip Celtic, the English club is lagging behind the Hoops in the Champions League as a City fan tried to defend his team’s domestic season by having a swipe at Celtic.

arts.ttl: Mark Wilson names Celtic duo Brendan Rodgers is treating differently after Ibrox horror show
arts.sum: Mark Wilson stated that, going by the two performances, Rodgers is treating Auston Trusty and Liam Scales differently in Celtic colours. Wilson told Open Goal that Rodgers isn’t holding ‘Scales to the same standards’ by not dropping him, as he doesn’t know what has happened to Trusty.

arts.ttl: Celtic January sale escalates as Bernabei breaks cover with £5m exit 'agreed' and Palma addressed by Vieira
arts.sum: Some big paydays look to be on the way to Parkhead

arts.ttl: Martin O'Neill shares big Celtic regret and what Roy Keane did for 2003 UEFA Cup final when at Man United
arts.sum: Celtic fans are all well-versed on the Seville final and how the Porto players acted every time a Hoops player challenged them or when they scored. However, there is one major regret that the legendary manager had whilst at Celtic and he shared that whilst telling what Roy Keane did for the 2003 UEFA Cup final when he was still at Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers needs to be brave and drop Ange Postecoglou's signing for Celtic's clash v St Mirren
arts.sum: Whether the signs were there or not, especially given how Celtic’s League Cup final win over Rangers started, or if it’s just a blip, a response is needed. Reo Hatate should be dropped for Luke McCowan for Celtic v St Mirren

arts.ttl: La Liga club chase Celtic winger - gossip
arts.sum: Spanish interest in out of favour Celtic attacker and conflicting reports on future of Scotland defender...

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton urges Celtic to bounce back from Ibrox frustration as he weighs up Treble chances
arts.sum: Celtic will hope to call on their bouncebackability against St Mirren tomorrow following a resounding defeat against Rangers in midweek. Writing in his column for The Daily Record, Sutton has suggested that Celtic will be able to recover from their blip in midweek and believes they could go on to record a domestic treble come May.

arts.ttl: Matt O'Riley suffers life after Celtic gut punch as Brighton boss follows up brutal substitution with stinging verdict
arts.sum: The Danish international was hooked after 45 minutes against Arsenal by Fabian Hurzeler
